themes.theme: Broad USD softness on Iran diplomacy hopes and pre-Fed positioning
Oil surge (Brent >100) on Hormuz/war risk lifting CAD, pressuring energy importers
BoJ surprise/intervention risk keeping USD/JPY downside in focus
UK political risk and BoE hawkish tilt creating mixed GBP signals

key_observation: The energy shock is creating a policy divergence wedge — ECB may be forced to hike in June while the Fed still eyes a cut, which could compress EUR/USD vol but widen rate differentials unexpectedly in EUR's favor.
watch: This week's US data dump (TD Securities flagged) and any formal US-Iran negotiation announcement — a deal could unwind the oil bid and flip USD bearishness quickly.
